name: Stick Tournament
short_description: Stick Tournament is a Online Multiplayer 2D-Platformer for 2-8 Players, where you can compete against your friends in different levels.
detailed_description:
Stick Tournament is a Online Multiplayer 2D-Platformer, where you can compete against your friends in different levels.

  • 2 to 8 Players in Online Multiplayer
  • Over 45 different levels
  • The levels can be selected individually and you can choose a combination of your preferred levels yourself..
  • You can choose the number of total rounds and also adjust the overall speed for most of the levels.
  • You have the option to activate the voting menu and can vote on various effects (different running speed, change in gravity, ..) in the next level.
  • The Twitch integration allows your Twitch viewers to participate in this voting.
